preconditions: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Ensure the Home page is loaded in guest state with the Person/Profile button visible and enabled
Use approved valid credentials Username: krisadmin Password: Carwash#1 for positive authentication scenarios

testCases.title: Verify Login page opens from Home page using the Person/Profile button
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state
Click the Person/Profile button on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page opens from the Home page and displays the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button in an interactive state.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after navigation from Home page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page
Observe the Login page controls without entering credentials
testCases.expectedResult: The Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked by default while typing
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click inside the Password field
Type the password value Carwash#1
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered characters and does not display the plain-text password value on screen.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with approved valid credentials returns the user to authenticated Home state
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin in the Username field
Enter password Carwash#1 in the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page, removes the guest Home state, replaces the Person/Profile button with the logged-in user identity, and displays authenticated-user features.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username with valid password does not authenticate the user
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invalid username krisadmin1
Enter valid password Carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an error message is displayed, the application remains on the Login page or unauthenticated state, and authenticated Home controls are not shown.

testCases.title: Verify valid username with invalid password does not authenticate the user
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter valid username krisadmin
Enter invalid password Carwash#123
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, visible error feedback is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and invalid password combination is rejected
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invalid username invaliduser
Enter invalid password invalidpass
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The login attempt is rejected with visible authentication error feedback and the application does not transition to authenticated Home state.

testCases.title: Verify Login button behavior when Username and Password fields are empty
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username field empty
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Required field validation is displayed for Username and Password, login does not proceed, and the user remains on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when Username is empty and Password is entered
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username field empty
Enter password Carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A Username required validation message is displayed, authentication is blocked, and the Login page remains open.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when Password is empty and Username is entered
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A Password required validation message is displayed, login is not processed, and the user remains on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only Username and Password values are rejected
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter only spaces into the Username field
Enter only spaces into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application treats whitespace-only values as invalid input, prevents authentication, and displays validation or authentication error feedback while remaining on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing spaces in valid credentials are handled according to business rules
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username value with leading and trailing spaces around krisadmin
Enter password value with leading and trailing spaces around Carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application consistently handles leading and trailing spaces according to implemented business behavior and the observed authentication result is displayed without causing UI errors or unstable state transitions.

testCases.title: Verify Password field is case-sensitive for authentication
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin
Enter password carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails for incorrectly cased password input and the Login page remains displayed with authentication error feedback.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user from Login page to Home page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click the Back button on the Login page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state without authenticating the session.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user from Login page to Home page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click the Home button on the Login page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state and the Login page is closed.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated Home state displays logged-in user identity after successful login
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter valid username krisadmin
Enter valid password Carwash#1
Click the Login button
Observe the Home page after authentication completes
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page displays authenticated-user UI, the guest Person/Profile button is replaced with the logged-in user name, and authenticated-only features become available.

testCases.title: Verify long Username input value is rejected without breaking the Login page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter an excessively long Username value exceeding normal credential length
Enter password Carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page remains stable, authentication does not succeed with invalid long Username input, and validation or authentication error feedback is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify long Password input value is rejected without exposing password text
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter username krisadmin
Enter an excessively long Password value
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field remains masked, authentication fails for invalid long password input, and the Login page remains functional with visible error feedback.
